name: highchart-mcp-server
description: A **Model Context Protocol (MCP) server** designed to generate Highcharts‑based charts and visualizations in a **production‑ready**, **AI‑enhanced**, and **validated** manner. This server can be integrated with any MCP‑capable AI client (such as Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Dify, VSCode, etc.) to automate chart generation, validation, and export workflows.
author: Hasnain
